name: ddos_mitigation
description: a DDoS mitigation world with traffic scrubbing; actions detect, scrub, blackhole

card.description: a DDoS mitigation world with traffic scrubbing; actions detect, scrub, blackhole

rules: Each step recomputes to_server_pps, served_pps, dropped_pps, and status from the mitigation posture (scrubbing/blackholed) and traffic levels.
'detect' sets detected=True when attack_pps + legit_pps exceeds capacity_pps; it observes but does not change traffic routing.
'scrub' enables traffic scrubbing: scrub_efficiency of attack_pps is dropped and the rest plus legit_pps is forwarded; scrubbing and blackhole are mutually exclusive.
'blackhole' null-routes the target: all traffic (attack and legitimate) is dropped and served_pps falls to 0 (status 'blackholed').
'restore' clears all mitigation and returns to normal routing.

When forwarded traffic is within capacity_pps, legitimate traffic is fully served (status 'mitigated' under scrubbing, 'nominal' with no attack); otherwise the edge is 'overloaded' and served_pps is 0.

transition.code:
def _recompute(s):
    attack = s["attack_pps"]
    legit = s["legit_pps"]
    cap = s["capacity_pps"]
    eff = s["scrub_efficiency"]
    if s["blackholed"]:
        # Null-route: everything is dropped at the edge, service goes dark.
        s["to_server_pps"] = 0
        s["served_pps"] = 0
        s["dropped_pps"] = attack + legit
        s["status"] = "blackholed"
    elif s["scrubbing"]:
        # Scrubbing center filters the flood; a small fraction leaks through.
        leaked = int(round(attack * (1.0 - eff)))
        to_server = legit + leaked
        s["to_server_pps"] = to_server
        s["dropped_pps"] = attack - leaked
        if to_server <= cap:
            s["served_pps"] = legit
            s["status"] = "mitigated"
        else:
            # Even scrubbed residue overwhelms the edge.
            s["served_pps"] = 0
            s["status"] = "overloaded"
    else:
        # No mitigation: raw traffic hits the edge.
        incoming = attack + legit
        s["to_server_pps"] = incoming
        s["dropped_pps"] = 0
        if incoming <= cap:
            s["served_pps"] = legit
            s["status"] = "nominal"
        else:
            # Congestion collapse: the flood starves legitimate traffic.
            s["served_pps"] = 0
            s["status"] = "overloaded"
    return s


def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name") if isinstance(action, dict) else action
    if name == "detect":
        # Detection trips when total volume exceeds what the edge can absorb.
        s["detected"] = (s["attack_pps"] + s["legit_pps"]) > s["capacity_pps"]
    elif name == "scrub":
        s["scrubbing"] = True
        s["blackholed"] = False
    elif name == "blackhole":
        s["blackholed"] = True
        s["scrubbing"] = False
    elif name == "restore":
        s["scrubbing"] = False
        s["blackholed"] = False
    return _recompute(s)

emit.report: DDoS mitigation status: {status} (attack detected: {detected}). Traffic to server: {to_server_pps} pps; legitimate served: {served_pps} pps; dropped: {dropped_pps} pps.
